description: As an IT Procurement Specialist, process the end-of-lease return for MacBook Pro 16 laptops from 'Apple Financial Services'. Create a new status label named 'Returned to Lessor' with an 'Archived' behavior. For all hardware assets supplied by 'Apple Financial Services', ensure they are checked in, update their status to 'Returned to Lessor', and add 'RMA-99281-RETURN' to their Notes field. Do not modify, check in, or add notes to assets from the supplier 'CDW'.
